queries.name: list_sort_edges
queries.cypher: RETURN list_element(list_sort(list_creation(10, 2, 9)), 0) AS smallest, list_element(list_reverse_sort(list_creation(10, 2, 9)), 0) AS largest

queries.name: list_contains_and_position
queries.cypher: RETURN list_contains(list_creation('red', 'green', 'blue'), 'green') AS has_green, list_position(list_creation('red', 'green', 'blue'), 'blue') AS blue_pos

queries.name: map_lookup_and_contains
queries.cypher: RETURN list_element(map_extract(map(list_creation('a', 'b'), list_creation(10, 20)), 'b'), 0) AS value_b, map_contains(map(list_creation('a', 'b'), list_creation(10, 20)), 'a') AS has_a

queries.name: struct_extract_and_key_count
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_extract(struct_pack('name', 'alice', 'age', 30), 'age') AS age, list_len(keys(struct_pack('name', 'alice', 'age', 30))) AS key_count

queries.name: date_and_timestamp_arithmetic
queries.cypher: RETURN date_add('day', date('2024-01-01'), 5) AS plus_days, date_diff('day', date('2024-01-01'), date('2024-01-10')) AS diff_days, timestamp_add('hour', timestamp('2024-01-01T00:00:00Z'), 6) AS plus_hours
